findings.issue: Automated decision consent flow is insufficient
findings.recommended_fix: Review and revise the consent flow to ensure it meets GDPR requirements

findings.issue: Compliance for Baku launch is uncertain
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct a thorough review of the Act's requirements and ensure compliance before launch

findings.issue: Using AURA score for hiring decisions may expose the platform to legal liability
findings.recommended_fix: Consult with legal experts to assess and mitigate potential liability

findings.issue: DPAs are in place for Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway
Current ToS may not adequately cover AI-generated assessments
findings.recommended_fix: Review and revise the ToS to ensure it addresses AI-generated assessments
